sections.paragraph: Jud. 1:35 1Ki 4:9, and שַׁעֲלַבִּין Jos 19:42 (“place of foxes,” for the fuller בֵּית שׁ׳, compare Arab. ثَعْلَبُ i.q. שׁוּעָל a fox), [Shaalbim, Shaalabbin], pr.n. of a town of the Danites, see Relandi Palæstina, p. 988. Gent. n. שַׁעַלְבֹנִי (as if from שַׁעַלְבֹון), 2Sa 23:32 1Ch 11:33.
